comp_req__login_ok.title: Login succeeds with valid credentials
comp_req__login_ok.content: The system shall authenticate when credentials match the store.

comp_req__logout_ok.title: Logout discards the session
comp_req__logout_ok.content: The system shall discard the session token on logout.

comp_req__lock_ok.title: Lock after five failed attempts
comp_req__lock_ok.content: The system shall lock the account after five consecutive failed logins.
